raw_consumer_statement: I purchased a lap top on XXXX XXXX. We found the laptop had a defective battery and called to return. They told us to ship it back to them. My son said a defective battery was dangerous to ship in the mail so we returned it to the best buy store in XXXX, NY. We asked about the cancelation of the XXXX XXXX  for this laptop. It was supposed to be canceled. XX/XX/year> I received a bill for XXXX for XXXX XXXX. I called credit card customer service and they sent me to XXXX XXXX. I received a conformation number to remove the charge. XX/XX/year> I received another credit card bill with late fees. I called credit card customer service and was told they dod not communicate with store. Called XXXX XXXX and received email of proof of cancelation. Credit card did not want proof from me. I went to XXXX XXXXXXXX in XXXX XXXX XXXX. Was told by a man named XXXX that he would personally take care of charge to corporate office. I am receiving calls from credit card company daily, sometimes 3 times a day. All calls are animated and will not direct me to a person to help with this charge. I don't know what else to do about the charge. I don't feel this is a charge I should have to pay and iit is rising and I don't know how to resolve the problem.
